Node.help: This contains information relating to a traffic generating activity the traffic is typically generated at the layer 7 level.

PropertyString.name: activityId
PropertyString.description: The activity name within the ActivityModel this instance belong to

PropertyInt.name: symbolicMapping
PropertyInt.description: symbolic IP option: kNotApplicable, kPortPairs, kPortMash

PropertyString.name: objectiveType
PropertyString.description: Should be one from the activity objective supported list

PropertyDouble.name: objectiveValue
PropertyDouble.description: Should be within the range set by the activity for the objective selected

PropertyNode.name: trafficShape
PropertyNode.help: Subelement that describes the shape of the traffic generated by this activity. See the documentation on TrafficShape object for more info.
